title: polypodium lanceolatum var. elongatum
intro: Polypodium lanceolatum var. elongatum, also known as the elongated polypody, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The elongated polypody has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Polypodium lanceolatum var. elongatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional remedies for its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever.
